addedLines: - claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)

- claude-code-guide: Use this agent when the user asks questions ("Can Claude...", "Does Claude...", "How do I...") about: (1) Claude Code (the CLI tool) - features, hooks, slash commands, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations, keyboard shortcuts; (2) Claude Agent SDK - building custom agents; (3) Claude API (formerly Anthropic API) - API usage, tool use, Anthropic SDK usage. **IMPORTANT:** Before spawning a new agent, check if there is already a running or recently completed claude-code-guide agent that you can continue via SendMessage. (Tools: Glob, Grep, Read, WebFetch, WebSearch)

- Explore: Fast read-only search agent for locating code. Use it to find files by pattern (eg. "src/components/**/*.tsx"), grep for symbols or keywords (eg. "API endpoints"), or answer "where is X defined / which files reference Y." Do NOT use it for code review, design-doc auditing, cross-file consistency checks, or open-ended analysis â€” it reads excerpts rather than whole files and will miss content past its read window. When calling, specify search breadth: "quick" for a single targeted lookup, "medium" for moderate exploration, or "very thorough" to search across multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)

- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)

- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)

- vercel:ai-architect: Specializes in architecting AI-powered applications on Vercel â€” choosing between AI SDK patterns, configuring providers, building agents, setting up durable workflows, and integrating MCP servers. Use when designing AI features, building chatbots, or creating agentic applications. (Tools: All tools)

- vercel:deployment-expert: Specializes in Vercel deployment strategies, CI/CD pipelines, preview URLs, production promotions, rollbacks, environment variables, and domain configuration. Use when troubleshooting deployments, setting up CI/CD, or optimizing the deploy pipeline. (Tools: All tools)

- vercel:performance-optimizer: Specializes in optimizing Vercel application performance â€” Core Web Vitals, rendering strategies, caching, image optimization, font loading, edge computing, and bundle size. Use when investigating slow pages, improving Lighthouse scores, or optimizing loading performance. (Tools: All tools)

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; highâ†’max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only â€” it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK â€” model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER â€” read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" â€” whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) â€” never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named â€” don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review
- security-review

13	Usine editoriale SEO/AEO/GEO composee de 26 agents specialises orchestres par LangGraph.
14	Produit tout type de contenu pour toute entreprise, mot-cle et objectif.

17	- Orchestrateur : LangGraph >= 1.2.5 (pattern Subagents as Tools)
18	- Memoire : ChromaDB (vectorielle) + SQLite (etat pipeline via LangGraph SqliteSaver)

21	- Validation : Pydantic >= 2.0

33	6. Securite â€” .env pour secrets, Pydantic a toutes les frontieres

35	## Regles critiques
36	- Aucun agent code avant cahier des charges valide (FAIT)
37	- Un seul agent a la fois, dans l'ordre logique
38	- Validation explicite utilisateur avant de passer a l'etape suivante

# Hermes SEO v3 â€” Contexte projet

## Concept
Usine editoriale SEO/AEO/GEO composee de 26 agents specialises orchestres par LangGraph.
Produit tout type de contenu pour toute entreprise, mot-cle et objectif.

## Stack technique
- Orchestrateur : LangGraph >= 1.2.5 (pattern Subagents as Tools)
- Memoire : ChromaDB (vectorielle) + SQLite (etat pipeline via LangGraph SqliteSaver)
- Langage : Python 3.12+
- LLMs : Claude Sonnet 4.6 (redaction), GPT-5.4 (analyse structuree), Claude Haiku 4.5 (verification), DeepSeek V4 Flash (taches legeres, $0.14/$0.28 par million tokens)
- Validation : Pydantic >= 2.0
- Logging : Loguru JSON structure
- CLI : Click + Rich
- Tests : pytest >= 8.0, pytest-mock, pytest-asyncio
- SERP API : HasData (prioritaire) ou Serpstack

## 6 principes directeurs
1. Qualite â€” Score Agent 25 >= 75/100 pour publier
2. Simplicite â€” CLI a une commande
3. Rapidite â€” DeepSeek pour 10 agents legers, async
4. Cout maitrise â€” Budget token/cost avec arret bloquant, article premium ~$0.25
5. Fonctionnel â€” Tests obligatoires, mode dry-run par defaut en dev
6. Securite â€” .env pour secrets, Pydantic a toutes les frontieres

## Regles critiques
- Aucun agent code avant cahier des charges valide (FAIT)
- Un seul agent a la fois, dans l'ordre logique
- Validation explicite utilisateur avant de passer a l'etape suivante
- 1 fichier par agent
- Mode dry-run/replay par defaut pendant le dev
- Tests obligatoires : entree valide, invalide, sortie conforme, erreur controlee
- Startup check obligatoire avant tout pipeline
- Versioning des prompts : prompts/agent_XX_nom/vN/system.md
- Jamais modifier un prompt en prod sans incrementer la version
- Refus des rustines : toute anomalie â†’ analyse + test + validation pipeline complet

## Mode replay = mode de debogage par defaut
On ne debogue jamais en production avec de vraies API.

## Agents non skippables
00 (Superviseur), 01 (Brief Entreprise), 04 (Intention & Type), 07 (Template), 15 (Fact-checking), 25 (Critique Qualite), validation Pydantic, logs, sauvegarde session.

## Modes qualite
- fast : 9 agents essentiels
- standard : 20 agents
- premium : 27 agents (tous)
- compliance : premium + double fact-check + validation humaine
- debug : tous + logs detailles + dry-run

## Fichiers cles
- CAHIER_DES_CHARGES.md : specification technique complete
- agents_registry.yaml : registre des 26 agents
- pyproject.toml : dependances
- .env.example : template variables environnement

## Utilisateur
- Email : f.carriere0@gmail.com
- Projet : creation d'une usine editoriale SEO
- CMS cible prioritaire : WordPress

# 6 principes directeurs pour Hermes SEO

Ces principes doivent guider chaque dÃ©cision technique, chaque ligne de code, chaque choix d'architecture.

1. **QualitÃ©** â€” Le contenu livrÃ© doit rÃ©pondre aux attentes des utilisateurs finaux. La grille de scoring (Agent 25) est le garde-fou. Si le score < 75/100, on ne publie pas.

2. **SimplicitÃ©** â€” L'interface utilisateur est un CLI Ã  une commande. `python -m hermes.main run --keyword "..."`. Pas d'interface complexe, pas de configuration XML absconse. Un fichier `.env` et c'est parti.

"""Hermes SEO â€” Interface Web. Application Streamlit pour utilisateurs non-techniques. Un champ mot-clÃ©, un bouton, et le contenu est gÃ©nÃ©rÃ©. """ import asyncio import sys from datetime import datetime from pathlib import Path import streamlit as st # S'assurer que le projet est dans le path sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent)) from hermes.config import configure_logging from hermes.core.session_manager import SessionManager from hermes.core.workflow import get_active_agents from hermes.models.common import AgentStatus, QualityMode from hermes.models.session import AgentResult, SessionConfig, SessionState from hermes.agents import AGENT_REGISTRY # Configuration de la page st.set_page_config( page_title="Hermes SEO", page_icon="ðŸ“", layout="wide", initial_sidebar_state="expanded", ) # Styles CSS st.markdown(""" """, unsafe_allow_html=True) # â”€â”€â”€ Initialisation de session Streamlit â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ if "pipeline_done" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.pipeline_done = False if "session_id" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.session_id = None if "content" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.content = None if "scores" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.scores = None if "agent_results" not in st.session_state: st.session_state.agent_results = {} async def _run_pipeline(session: SessionState, progress_bar, status_text) -> SessionState: """Execute le pipeline complet avec feedback temps reel.""" active = get_active_agents( mode=session.config.mode, secteur=session.config.secteur, user_skipped=list(session.config.user_skipped_agents), has_existing_content=False, has_locale_target=bool(session.config.target_locales), ) total = len(active) agent_names = { "agent_00": "Superviseur", "agent_01": "Brief entreprise", "agent_02": "Persona", "agent_03": "Analyse SERP", "agent_04": "Intention", "agent_05": "Offre & Conversion", "agent_06": "DiffÃ©renciation", "agent_07": "Template", "agent_08": "Anti-cannibalisation", "agent_09": "âœï¸ RÃ©daction", "agent_10": "SEO", "agent_11": "AEO", "agent_12": "GEO", "agent_13": "EEAT", "agent_14": "ConformitÃ©", "agent_15": "Fact-checking", "agent_16": "Maillage interne", "agent_17": "Maillage externe", "agent_18": "Multiformat", "agent_19": "Test A/B", "agent_20": "Localisation", "agent_21": "Schema.org", "agent_22": "Images", "agent_23": "CMS Export", "agent_24": "Mise Ã  jour", "agent_25": "Critique QualitÃ©", "agent_26": "Audit", } for i, agent_id in enumerate(active): name = agent_names.get(agent_id, agent_id) progress = (i + 1) / total progress_bar.progress(progress, text=f"{name}...") status_text.text(f"Ã‰tape {i+1}/{total} : {name}") if agent_id in AGENT_REGISTRY: try: session.current_agent_id = agent_id session = await AGENT_REGISTRY[agent_id](session) result = session.agent_results.get(agent_id) st.session_state.agent_results[agent_id] = ( result.status.value if result else "?" ) except Exception as e: st.session_state.agent_results[agent_id] = f"âŒ {e}" return session def run_pipeline_sync(session, progress_bar, status_text): return asyncio.run(_run_pipeline(session, progress_bar, status_text)) # â”€â”€â”€ Sidebar â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ with st.sidebar: st.image("https://img.icons8.com/fluency/96/document.png", width=60) st.markdown("## âš™ï¸ Configuration") mode_labels = { "fast": "âš¡ Rapide â€” Essentiel seulement", "standard": "â­ Standard â€” RecommandÃ©", "premium": "ðŸ’Ž Premium â€” Complet", "compliance": "ðŸ›¡ï¸ ConformitÃ© â€” Secteurs rÃ©glementÃ©s", } mode_choice = st.selectbox( "Mode qualitÃ©", options=list(mode_labels.keys()), format_func=lambda x: mode_labels[x], index=1, ) secteur_labels = { "autre": "GÃ©nÃ©raliste", "finance": "Finance / Assurance", "sante": "SantÃ© / MÃ©dical", "droit": "Droit / Juridique", "ecommerce": "E-commerce", "saas": "SaaS / Logiciel", "formation": "Formation", "immobilier": "Immobilier", "tourisme": "Tourisme", "rh": "RH / Recrutement", "cybersecurite": "CybersÃ©curitÃ©", "enfants": "Enfants / Jeunesse", } secteur = st.selectbox( "Secteur d'activitÃ©", options=list(secteur_labels.keys()), format_func=lambda x: secteur_labels[x], ) st.markdown("---") st.markdown("### ðŸ”— Options") site_url = st.text_input("URL du site (optionnel)", placeholder="https://mon-site.fr") objectif = st.text_area("Objectif (optionnel)", placeholder="Ex: GÃ©nÃ©rer un guide complet sur...", height=80) st.markdown("---") st.markdown("### ðŸ’° Mode") dry_run = st.checkbox("Mode essai (gratuit, sans API)", value=True, help="En mode essai, aucun appel API rÃ©el n'est effectuÃ©. " "IdÃ©al pour tester avant de consommer du budget.") if not dry_run: st.warning("âš ï¸ Le mode rÃ©el consomme du budget API. VÃ©rifiez vos clÃ©s dans .env.") st.markdown("---") st.markdown("### ðŸ“Š Session") if st.session_state.session_id: st.success(f"Session: `{st.session_state.session_id}`") if st.button("ðŸ“‹ Copier l'ID"): st.code(st.session_state.session_id) # â”€â”€â”€ Page principale â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ col1, col2 = st.columns([3, 1]) with col1: st.markdown('

start_time).total_seconds() progress_bar.progress(1.0, text="TerminÃ© !") status_text.success(f"Contenu gÃ©nÃ©rÃ© en {elapsed:.1f}s â€” Session: `{session.session_id}`") # Stocker les rÃ©sultats st.session_state.pipeline_done = True st.session_state.content = { "html": session.brouillon_html or "", "title": (session.seo_data or {}).get("title_optimise", keyword), "meta": (session.seo_data or {}).get("meta_description_optimise", ""), "schema": (session.ld_json or {}).get("ld_json", ""), } st.session_state.scores = session.scores st.session_state.session = session st.rerun() elif replay and st.session_state.session_id: # Rejouer la session sauvegardÃ©e manager = SessionManager(Path("sessions")) session = manager.load(st.session_state.session_id) session.config.dry_run = True progress_bar = st.progress(0, text="Replay...") status_text = st.empty() session = run_pipeline_sync(session, progress_bar, status_text) st.rerun() # â”€â”€â”€ RÃ©sultats â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ if st.session_state.pipeline_done and st.session_state.scores: st.markdown("---") st.markdown("## ðŸ“Š RÃ©sultats") scores = st.session_state.scores score_total = scores.get("score_total", 0) seuil = scores.get("seuil_publication", 75) seuil_ok = scores.get("seuil_atteint", False) # Score global cols = st.columns(4) with cols[0]: color = "score-green" if score_total >= 80 else ("score-orange" if score_total >= 65 else "score-red") st.markdown( f'

Score QualitÃ©

' f'{score_total}/100' f'

Seuil: {seuil}

DÃ©cision

{verdict}

', unsafe_allow_html=True, ) with cols[2]: eeat = st.session_state.session.score_eeat or {} st.markdown( f'

Score EEAT

', unsafe_allow_html=True, ) with cols[3]: fiab = st.session_state.session.fact_check_data or {} st.markdown( f'

FiabilitÃ©

', unsafe_allow_html=True, ) # DÃ©tail des critÃ¨res st.markdown("### DÃ©tail des 9 critÃ¨res") grille = scores.get("scores", {}) criteres = [ ("LisibilitÃ©", grille.get("lisibilite", 0), 10), ("DensitÃ© sÃ©mantique", grille.get("densite_semantique", 0), 15), ("RÃ©ponse aux PAA", grille.get("reponse_paa", 0), 20), ("OriginalitÃ©", grille.get("originalite", 0), 15), ("FraÃ®cheur des sources", grille.get("fraicheur", 0), 10), ("Respect AEO", grille.get("respect_aeo", 0), 10), ("Respect GEO", grille.get("respect_geo", 0), 10), ("Absence d'erreurs", grille.get("absence_erreurs", 0), 6), ("NaturalitÃ©", grille.get("naturalite", 0), 4), ] for nom, valeur, max_val in criteres: pct = valeur / max_val if max_val else 0 color = "green" if pct >= 0.7 else ("orange" if pct >= 0.4 else "red") st.markdown( f'

content.content:
1	"""Hermes SEO â€” Runner batch.
2	
3	Lance le pipeline sur plusieurs mots-cles depuis un fichier CSV.
4	Usage: python batch_runner.py mots_cles.csv
5	"""
6	
7	import asyncio
8	import csv
9	import sys
10	from datetime import datetime
11	from pathlib import Path
12	
13	sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent))
14	
15	from hermes.core.session_manager import SessionManager
16	from hermes.core.workflow import get_active_agents
17	from hermes.models.common import AgentStatus, QualityMode
18	from hermes.models.session import SessionConfig, SessionState
19	from hermes.agents import AGENT_REGISTRY
20	
21	
22	async def run_one(keyword: str, site_url: str, secteur: str, mode: str,
23	                  objectif: str = "", dry_run: bool = True) -> SessionState:
24	    session = SessionState(
25	        keyword=keyword,
26	        site_url=site_url or None,
27	        objectif=objectif or None,
28	        config=SessionConfig(
29	            mode=QualityMode(mode),
30	            dry_run=dry_run,
31	            secteur=secteur or "autre",
32	        ),
33	    )
34	
35	    active = get_active_agents(
36	        mode=session.config.mode,
37	        secteur=session.config.secteur,
38	        has_existing_content=False,
39	        has_locale_target=False,
40	    )
41	
42	    for agent_id in active:
43	        if agent_id in AGENT_REGISTRY:
44	            session.current_agent_id = agent_id
45	            session = await AGENT_REGISTRY[agent_id](session)
46	
47	    return session
48	
49	
50	async def run_batch(input_csv: str, output_dir: str = "sessions",
51	                    dry_run: bool = True, mode: str = "standard"):
52	    """Execute le pipeline pour chaque ligne du CSV."""
53	    manager = SessionManager(Path(output_dir))
54	    results = []
55	
56	    with open(input_csv, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
57	        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
58	        rows = list(reader)
59	
60	    total = len(rows)
61	    print(f"Hermes SEO Batch â€” {total} articles a generer")
62	    print(f"Mode: {'essai (dry-run)' if dry_run else 'REEL (appels API)'}")
63	    print(f"Qualite: {mode}")
64	    print("-" * 60)
65	
66	    for i, row in enumerate(rows, 1):
67	        keyword = row.get("keyword", "").strip()
68	        if not keyword:
69	            continue
70	
71	        site_url = row.get("site_url", "").strip()
72	        secteur = row.get("secteur", "autre").strip()
73	        objectif = row.get("objectif", "").strip()
74	
75	        print(f"\n[{i}/{total}] '{keyword}' ...", end=" ", flush=True)
76	        start = datetime.now()
77	
78	        try:
79	            session = await run_one(
80	                keyword=keyword,
81	                site_url=site_url,
82	                secteur=secteur,
83	                mode=mode,
84	                objectif=objectif,
85	                dry_run=dry_run,
86	            )
87	            elapsed = (datetime.now() - start).total_seconds()
88	            score = (session.scores or {}).get("score_total", "?")
89	            print(f"OK ({elapsed:.0f}s, score={score}/100)")
90	
91	            manager.save(session)
92	            results.append({
93	                "keyword": keyword,
94	                "session_id": session.session_id,
95	                "score": score,
96	                "status": "ok",
97	            })
98	        except Exception as e:
99	            print(f"ECHEC: {e}")
100	            results.append({
101	                "keyword": keyword,
102	                "status": f"erreur: {e}",
103	            })
104	
105	    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
106	    ok = sum(1 for r in results if r.get("status") == "ok")
107	    print(f"Termine : {ok}/{total} articles generes avec succes.")
108	    if ok < total:
109	        failed = [r for r in results if r.get("status") != "ok"]
110	        for f in failed:
111	            print(f"  âŒ {f['keyword']}: {f['status']}")
112	
113	    # Sauvegarder le rapport
114	    report_path = Path(output_dir) / f"batch_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.csv"
115	    with open(report_path, "w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
116	        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["keyword", "session_id", "score", "status"])
117	        writer.writeheader()
118	        writer.writerows(results)
119	    print(f"Rapport: {report_path}")
120	
121	
122	if __name__ == "__main__":

"""Hermes SEO â€” Runner batch.

Lance le pipeline sur plusieurs mots-cles depuis un fichier CSV.
Usage: python batch_runner.py mots_cles.csv
"""

import asyncio
import csv
import sys
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent))

from hermes.core.session_manager import SessionManager
from hermes.core.workflow import get_active_agents
from hermes.models.common import AgentStatus, QualityMode
from hermes.models.session import SessionConfig, SessionState
from hermes.agents import AGENT_REGISTRY


async def run_one(keyword: str, site_url: str, secteur: str, mode: str,
                  objectif: str = "", dry_run: bool = True) -> SessionState:
    session = SessionState(
        keyword=keyword,
        site_url=site_url or None,
        objectif=objectif or None,
        config=SessionConfig(
            mode=QualityMode(mode),
            dry_run=dry_run,
            secteur=secteur or "autre",
        ),
    )

    active = get_active_agents(
        mode=session.config.mode,
        secteur=session.config.secteur,
        has_existing_content=False,
        has_locale_target=False,
    )

    for agent_id in active:
        if agent_id in AGENT_REGISTRY:
            session.current_agent_id = agent_id
            session = await AGENT_REGISTRY[agent_id](session)

    return session


async def run_batch(input_csv: str, output_dir: str = "sessions",
                    dry_run: bool = True, mode: str = "standard"):
    """Execute le pipeline pour chaque ligne du CSV."""
    manager = SessionManager(Path(output_dir))
    results = []

    with open(input_csv, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        rows = list(reader)

    total = len(rows)
    print(f"Hermes SEO Batch â€” {total} articles a generer")
    print(f"Mode: {'essai (dry-run)' if dry_run else 'REEL (appels API)'}")
    print(f"Qualite: {mode}")
    print("-" * 60)

    for i, row in enumerate(rows, 1):
        keyword = row.get("keyword", "").strip()
        if not keyword:
            continue

        site_url = row.get("site_url", "").strip()
        secteur = row.get("secteur", "autre").strip()
        objectif = row.get("objectif", "").strip()

        print(f"\n[{i}/{total}] '{keyword}' ...", end=" ", flush=True)
        start = datetime.now()

        try:
            session = await run_one(
                keyword=keyword,
                site_url=site_url,
                secteur=secteur,
                mode=mode,
                objectif=objectif,
                dry_run=dry_run,
            )
            elapsed = (datetime.now() - start).total_seconds()
            score = (session.scores or {}).get("score_total", "?")
            print(f"OK ({elapsed:.0f}s, score={score}/100)")

            manager.save(session)
            results.append({
                "keyword": keyword,
                "session_id": session.session_id,
                "score": score,
                "status": "ok",
            })
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"ECHEC: {e}")
            results.append({
                "keyword": keyword,
                "status": f"erreur: {e}",
            })

    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    ok = sum(1 for r in results if r.get("status") == "ok")
    print(f"Termine : {ok}/{total} articles generes avec succes.")
    if ok < total:
        failed = [r for r in results if r.get("status") != "ok"]
        for f in failed:
            print(f"  âŒ {f['keyword']}: {f['status']}")

    # Sauvegarder le rapport
    report_path = Path(output_dir) / f"batch_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.csv"
    with open(report_path, "w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["keyword", "session_id", "score", "status"])
        writer.writeheader()
        writer.writerows(results)
    print(f"Rapport: {report_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import argparse
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Hermes SEO Batch Runner")
    parser.add_argument("csv_file", help="Fichier CSV (colonnes: keyword, site_url, secteur, objectif)")
    parser.add_argument("--output", "-o", default="sessions", help="Dossier de sortie")
    parser.add_argument("--real", action="store_true", help="Mode reel (appels API)")
    parser.add_argument("--mode", "-m", default="standard",
                       choices=["fast", "standard", "premium", "compliance", "debug"])
    args = parser.parse_args()

    asyncio.run(run_batch(
        input_csv=args.csv_file,
        output_dir=args.output,
        dry_run=not args.real,
        mode=args.mode,
    ))

# DÃ©ployer Hermes SEO sur Streamlit Cloud

Accessible partout, sans rien installer. Gratuit.

## En 5 minutes

### Ã‰tape 1 â€” CrÃ©er un compte GitHub

https://github.com â€” gratuit.

### Ã‰tape 2 â€” Pousser le code sur GitHub

```bash
cd C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo
git init
git add .
git commit -m "Hermes SEO v3 â€” 26 agents"
git branch -M main
git remote add origin https://github.com/VOTRE-USERNAME/hermes-seo.git
git push -u origin main
```

### Ã‰tape 3 â€” Connecter Streamlit Cloud

1. Aller sur https://streamlit.io/cloud
2. Cliquer "Sign in with GitHub"
3. Cliquer "New app"
4. SÃ©lectionner le repo `hermes-seo`
5. Fichier principal : `app.py`
6. Cliquer "Deploy"

Le dÃ©ploiement est **automatique** Ã  chaque `git push`.

### Ã‰tape 4 â€” Configurer les clÃ©s API (optionnel)

Dans l'interface Streamlit Cloud :
- App Settings â†’ Secrets
- Copier-coller le contenu de `.streamlit/secrets.toml`
- Remplir les clÃ©s API
- Cliquer "Save"

Le mode essai (dry-run) fonctionne **sans aucune clÃ© API**.
DÃ©cochez le mode essai dans l'interface quand les clÃ©s sont prÃªtes.

## RÃ©sultat

Votre app est accessible Ã  l'adresse :
```
https://VOTRE-USERNAME-hermes-seo-app-XXXX.streamlit.app
```

Depuis n'importe quel appareil : PC, Mac, tablette, tÃ©lÃ©phone.

## Mode essai vs Mode production

| Mode | ClÃ©s API | CoÃ»t | Utilisation |
|------|---------|------|-------------|
| Essai (dry-run) | Aucune | 0â‚¬ | Test, dÃ©mo, prototypage |
| Production | Au moins 1 LLM | ~0.25â‚¬/article | Contenu rÃ©el |

Le mode essai produit du contenu simulÃ© de qualitÃ© â€” idÃ©al pour tester
la structure et le flux avant d'activer les vraies API.

## Mise Ã  jour

AprÃ¨s chaque modification :
```bash
git add .
git commit -m "Description du changement"
git push
```

Streamlit Cloud redÃ©ploie automatiquement en 1-2 minutes.

1	"""Gestionnaire de sessions Hermes SEO.
2	
3	Sauvegarde, restauration, listing des sessions.
4	"""
5	
6	import json
7	from datetime import datetime
8	from pathlib import Path
9	from typing import Optional
10	
11	from hermes.core.exceptions import SessionNotFoundError
12	from hermes.models.session import AgentResult, SessionState
13	
14	
15	class SessionManager:
16	    """GÃ¨re la persistance des sessions sur disque."""
17	
18	    def __init__(self, sessions_dir: Path):
19	        self._dir = Path(sessions_dir)
20	        self._dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
21	
22	    def _path(self, session_id: str) -> Path:
23	        return self._dir / f"{session_id}.json"
24	
25	    def save(self, session: SessionState) -> Path:
26	        """Sauvegarde une session complÃ¨te."""
27	        session.updated_at = datetime.now()
28	        path = self._path(session.session_id)
29	        path.write_text(
30	            session.model_dump_json(indent=2, exclude_none=False),
31	            encoding="utf-8",
32	        )
33	        return path
34	
35	    def load(self, session_id: str) -> SessionState:
36	        """Charge une session depuis le disque."""
37	        path = self._path(session_id)
38	        if not path.exists():
39	            raise SessionNotFoundError(f"Session {session_id} introuvable dans {self._dir}")
40	        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
41	        return SessionState.model_validate(data)
42	
43	    def load_or_none(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[SessionState]:
44	        """Charge une session, retourne None si absente."""
45	        try:
46	            return self.load(session_id)
47	        except SessionNotFoundError:
48	            return None
49	
50	    def list_sessions(self) -> list[dict]:
51	        """Liste toutes les sessions sauvegardÃ©es."""
52	        sessions = []
53	        for f in sorted(self._dir.glob("*.json"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True):
54	            if "_backup" in f.name:
55	                continue
56	            try:
57	                data = json.loads(f.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
58	                sessions.append({
59	                    "session_id": data.get("session_id", f.stem),
60	                    "keyword": data.get("keyword", ""),
61	                    "status": data.get("status", "unknown"),
62	                    "updated_at": data.get("updated_at", ""),
63	                    "agent_count": len(data.get("agent_results", {})),
64	                })
65	            except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError):
66	                continue
67	        return sessions
68	
69	    def delete(self, session_id: str) -> None:
70	        """Supprime une session."""
71	        path = self._path(session_id)
72	        if path.exists():
73	            path.unlink()
74	
75	    def has_session(self, session_id: str) -> bool:
76	        return self._path(session_id).exists()
77	
78	    def create_backup(self, session_id: str) -> Optional[Path]:
79	        """CrÃ©e une sauvegarde avant reprise."""
80	        path = self._path(session_id)
81	        if not path.exists():
82	            return None
83	        backup = self._dir / f"{session_id}_backup.json"
84	        backup.write_bytes(path.read_bytes())
85	        return backup
86	
87	    def get_last_completed_agent(self, session: SessionState) -> Optional[str]:
88	        """Retourne l'ID du dernier agent complÃ©tÃ©."""
89	        completed = [
90	            agent_id
91	            for agent_id, result in session.agent_results.items()
92	            if result.status in ("completed", "skipped_auto", "skipped_user")
93	        ]
94	        return completed[-1] if completed else None
95

1	"""Ã‰tat complet d'une session Hermes SEO."""
2	
3	from datetime import datetime
4	from typing import Any, Optional
5	
6	from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
7	
8	from hermes.models.common import (
9	    AgentStatus,
10	    QualityMode,
11	    SessionStatus,
12	    generate_session_id,
13	)
14	
15	
16	class AgentResult(BaseModel):
17	    """RÃ©sultat d'exÃ©cution d'un agent."""
18	
19	    agent_id: str
20	    agent_name: str = ""
21	    status: AgentStatus = AgentStatus.PENDING
22	    started_at: Optional[datetime] = None
23	    finished_at: Optional[datetime] = None
24	    duration_ms: Optional[int] = None
25	    error_message: Optional[str] = None
26	    error_traceback: Optional[str] = None
27	    tokens_input: Optional[int] = None
28	    tokens_output: Optional[int] = None
29	    cost_estimated: Optional[float] = None
30	    prompt_version: Optional[str] = None
31	    model_used: Optional[str] = None
32	    skip_reason: Optional[str] = None
33	    skip_impact: Optional[str] = None
34	    data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
35	
36	
37	class SessionConfig(BaseModel):
38	    """Configuration d'une session."""
39	
40	    mode: QualityMode = QualityMode.STANDARD
41	    dry_run: bool = False
42	    replay_session_id: Optional[str] = None
43	    token_budget: int = Field(default=1_000_000, ge=0)
44	    cost_budget: float = Field(default=5.0, ge=0.0)
45	    target_url: Optional[str] = None
46	    target_cms: Optional[str] = None
47	    target_locales: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
48	    user_skipped_agents: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
49	    secteur: Optional[str] = None
50	    skip_confirmed: bool = False  # True si l'utilisateur a confirmÃ© les skips
51	
52	
53	class SessionState(BaseModel):
54	    """Ã‰tat complet d'une session Hermes SEO."""

"""Ã‰tat complet d'une session Hermes SEO."""

from datetime import datetime
from typing import Any, Optional

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from hermes.models.common import (
    AgentStatus,
    QualityMode,
    SessionStatus,
    generate_session_id,
)


class AgentResult(BaseModel):
    """RÃ©sultat d'exÃ©cution d'un agent."""

    agent_id: str
    agent_name: str = ""
    status: AgentStatus = AgentStatus.PENDING
    started_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    finished_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    duration_ms: Optional[int] = None
    error_message: Optional[str] = None
    error_traceback: Optional[str] = None
    tokens_input: Optional[int] = None
    tokens_output: Optional[int] = None
    cost_estimated: Optional[float] = None
    prompt_version: Optional[str] = None
    model_used: Optional[str] = None
    skip_reason: Optional[str] = None
    skip_impact: Optional[str] = None
    data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None


class SessionConfig(BaseModel):
    """Configuration d'une session."""

    mode: QualityMode = QualityMode.STANDARD
    dry_run: bool = False
    replay_session_id: Optional[str] = None
    token_budget: int = Field(default=1_000_000, ge=0)
    cost_budget: float = Field(default=5.0, ge=0.0)
    target_url: Optional[str] = None
    target_cms: Optional[str] = None
    target_locales: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    user_skipped_agents: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    secteur: Optional[str] = None
    skip_confirmed: bool = False  # True si l'utilisateur a confirmÃ© les skips


class SessionState(BaseModel):
    """Ã‰tat complet d'une session Hermes SEO."""

    session_id: str = Field(default_factory=generate_session_id)
    status: SessionStatus = SessionStatus.CREATED
    config: SessionConfig = Field(default_factory=SessionConfig)

    # EntrÃ©e utilisateur
    keyword: Optional[str] = None
    site_url: Optional[str] = None
    objectif: Optional[str] = None
    contraintes: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)

    # RÃ©sultats de chaque agent
    agent_results: dict[str, AgentResult] = Field(default_factory=dict)

    # DonnÃ©es accumulÃ©es (sorties validÃ©es de chaque agent)
    fiche_entreprise: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    fiche_persona: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    serp_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    intention: Optional[str] = None
    type_page: Optional[str] = None
    offre_conversion_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    angles_differenciants: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    template_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    anti_cannib_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    brouillon_html: Optional[str] = None
    seo_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    aeo_blocks: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    geo_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    score_eeat: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    conformite_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    fact_check_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    internal_links: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    external_links: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    multiformat_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    variants_ab: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    localised_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    ld_json: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    image_plan: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    export_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    plan_refresh: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    scores: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None
    feedback_data: Optional[dict[str, Any]] = None

    # MÃ©tadonnÃ©es
    created_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    updated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    current_agent_id: Optional[str] = None
    last_completed_agent_id: Optional[str] = None
    last_successful_agent_id: Optional[str] = None
    total_tokens: int = 0
    total_cost: float = 0.0
    error_count: int = 0
    warnings: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)

    def get_agent_result(self, agent_id: str) -> Optional[AgentResult]:
        return self.agent_results.get(agent_id)

    def agent_completed(self, agent_id: str) -> bool:
        result = self.get_agent_result(agent_id)
        return result is not None and result.status == AgentStatus.COMPLETED

    def agent_failed(self, agent_id: str) -> bool:
        result = self.get_agent_result(agent_id)
        return result is not None and result.status == AgentStatus.FAILED

"""Construction du graphe LangGraph pour Hermes SEO.

Le graphe est construit dynamiquement Ã  partir du registre des agents.
Chaque agent est un nÅ“ud, les transitions sont conditionnelles.
"""

from typing import Any, Optional

from langgraph.graph import END, StateGraph
from langgraph.checkpoint.memory import MemorySaver

from hermes.core.exceptions import SupervisorBlockError
from hermes.models.common import AgentStatus, QualityMode
from hermes.models.session import AgentResult, SessionConfig, SessionState


# â”€â”€â”€ Ordre canonique des agents â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

AGENT_ORDER: list[str] = [
    "agent_00",
    "agent_01",
    "agent_02",
    "agent_03",
    "agent_04",
    "agent_05",
    "agent_06",
    "agent_07",
    "agent_08",
    "agent_09",
    "agent_10",
    "agent_11",
    "agent_12",
    "agent_13",
    "agent_14",
    "agent_15",
    "agent_16",
    "agent_17",
    "agent_18",
    "agent_19",
    "agent_20",
    "agent_21",
    "agent_22",
    "agent_23",
    "agent_24",
    "agent_25",
    "agent_26",
]


def _next_agent(current: str) -> Optional[str]:
    """Retourne l'agent suivant dans l'ordre canonique."""
    try:
        idx = AGENT_ORDER.index(current)
        if idx + 1 < len(AGENT_ORDER):
            return AGENT_ORDER[idx + 1]
        return None
    except ValueError:
        return None


def _prev_agent(current: str) -> Optional[str]:
    try:
        idx = AGENT_ORDER.index(current)
        if idx > 0:
            return AGENT_ORDER[idx - 1]
        return None
    except ValueError:
        return None


def build_supervisor_graph(
    agent_nodes: dict[str, callable],
    supervisor_func: callable,
    checkpointer: Any = None,
) -> StateGraph:
    """Construit le graphe LangGraph complet.

    Args:
        agent_nodes: dict {agent_id: node_function} pour chaque agent.
        supervisor_func: fonction de supervision appelÃ©e avant chaque transition.
        checkpointer: instance de checkpointer LangGraph (MemorySaver, SqliteSaver...).

    Returns:
        Un StateGraph compilÃ© prÃªt Ã  Ãªtre invoquÃ©.
    """
    if checkpointer is None:
        checkpointer = MemorySaver()

    graph = StateGraph(SessionState)

    # Ajouter tous les nÅ“uds
    for agent_id, node_fn in agent_nodes.items():
        graph.add_node(agent_id, node_fn)

    # Ajouter le nÅ“ud superviseur (exÃ©cutÃ© avant chaque agent)
    graph.add_node("__supervisor__", supervisor_func)

    # Point d'entrÃ©e : superviseur puis premier agent
    graph.set_entry_point("__supervisor__")

    # Transition du superviseur vers l'agent 00
    graph.add_edge("__supervisor__", "agent_00")

    # ChaÃ®ne principale : chaque agent â†’ superviseur â†’ suivant
    for i, agent_id in enumerate(AGENT_ORDER):
        next_id = _next_agent(agent_id)
        if next_id:
            # Chaque agent va au superviseur, qui dÃ©cide
            graph.add_edge(agent_id, "__supervisor__")

            # Le superviseur dÃ©cide du prochain agent
            def make_router(next_agent: str):
                def router(state: SessionState) -> str:
                    result = state.agent_results.get(
                        state.current_agent_id or "",
                        AgentResult(agent_id="", status=AgentStatus.PENDING),
                    )

                    # Si l'agent courant a rÃ©ussi ou a Ã©tÃ© skippÃ©, on continue
                    if result.status in (
                        AgentStatus.COMPLETED,
                        AgentStatus.SKIPPED_AUTO,
                        AgentStatus.SKIPPED_USER,
                    ):
                        return next_agent

                    # Si Ã©chec, on arrÃªte
                    if result.status == AgentStatus.FAILED:
                        return END

                    # Sinon on bloque
                    return END

                return router

            graph.add_conditional_edges(
                "__supervisor__",
                make_router(next_id),
                {
                    next_id: next_id,
                    END: END,
                },
            )
        else:
            # Dernier agent â†’ fin
            graph.add_edge(agent_id, END)

    return graph.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer)


# â”€â”€â”€ Helpers pour le sÃ©quencement â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€


def get_agents_for_mode(mode: QualityMode) -> set[str]:
    """Retourne les agents activÃ©s pour un mode qualitÃ© donnÃ©."""
    fast = {
        "agent_00", "agent_01", "agent_04", "agent_07",
        "agent_09", "agent_10", "agent_11", "agent_15", "agent_25",
    }
    standard = fast | {
        "agent_02", "agent_03", "agent_05", "agent_06", "agent_08",
        "agent_12", "agent_13", "agent_16", "agent_21", "agent_22", "agent_23",
    }
    premium = standard | {
        "agent_14", "agent_17", "agent_18", "agent_19",
        "agent_20", "agent_24", "agent_26",
    }
    compliance = premium  # MÃªmes agents, comportement renforcÃ©
    debug = set(AGENT_ORDER)

    mapping = {
        QualityMode.FAST: fast,
        QualityMode.STANDARD: standard,
        QualityMode.PREMIUM: premium,
        QualityMode.COMPLIANCE: compliance,
        QualityMode.DEBUG: debug,
    }
    return mapping.get(mode, standard)


def get_active_agents(
    mode: QualityMode,
    secteur: Optional[str] = None,
    user_skipped: Optional[list[str]] = None,
    has_existing_content: bool = False,
    has_locale_target: bool = False,
) -> list[str]:
    """Calcule la liste des agents actifs selon le mode et le contexte.

    Combine le mode qualitÃ©, les dÃ©clencheurs conditionnels, et les skips
    utilisateur pour dÃ©terminer quels agents exÃ©cuter.
    """
    active = get_agents_for_mode(mode)
    skipped = set(user_skipped or [])

    # Agents toujours obligatoires (mÃªme en fast)
    mandatory = {"agent_00", "agent_01", "agent_04", "agent_07", "agent_09",
                 "agent_10", "agent_11", "agent_15", "agent_25"}

    # Agents conditionnels
    from hermes.models.common import SECTEURS_REGLEMENTES

    if secteur and secteur in SECTEURS_REGLEMENTES:
        active.add("agent_14")

    # Agent 08 obligatoire si contenus existants
    if has_existing_content:
        active.add("agent_08")

    # Agent 20 obligatoire si cible multilingue
    if has_locale_target:
        active.add("agent_20")

    # Forcer les obligatoires dans tous les cas
    active |= mandatory

    # Appliquer les skips utilisateur (sauf pour les non-skippables)
    non_skippable = {
        "agent_00", "agent_01", "agent_04", "agent_07",
        "agent_15", "agent_25",
    }
    if mode != QualityMode.DEBUG:
        # En mode non-debug, on ne peut pas skipper les non-skippables
        skipped -= non_skippable

    active -= skipped

    # Ordonner selon AGENT_ORDER
    return [a for a in AGENT_ORDER if a in active]

114	    ))

237	                    f"[dim]Relancez avec : hermes resume --session-id {session.session_id}[/dim]"
238	                )

241	            # Mettre Ã  jour l'affichage

244	            # Sauvegarder aprÃ¨s chaque agent

250	
251	    elapsed_total = (datetime.now() - session.created_at).total_seconds()
252	    console.print(
253	        f"\n[bold green]Pipeline terminÃ© avec succÃ¨s ![/bold green]\n"
254	        f"Session : [dim]{session.session_id}[/dim]\n"
255	        f"DurÃ©e totale : {elapsed_total:.1f}s\n"
256	        f"Budget : {budget.summary()}"
257	    )
258	
259	
260	def _update_table_row(table, result, agent_id):
261	    """Met Ã  jour une ligne dans le tableau de progression."""
262	    status_icons = {
263	        "completed": "[green]âœ“[/green]",
264	        "skipped_auto": "[yellow]â­[/yellow]",
265	        "skipped_user": "[yellow]â­[/yellow]",
266	        "failed": "[red]âœ—[/red]",
267	        "running": "[blue]â€¦[/blue]",
268	        "pending": "[dim]â—‹[/dim]",
269	    }
270	    icon = status_icons.get(result.status.value if hasattr(result.status, 'value') else str(result.status), "?")
271	    dur = f"{result.duration_ms}ms" if result.duration_ms else "-"
272	    tok = f"{result.tokens_input or 0}+{result.tokens_output or 0}" if result.tokens_input else "-"
273	    cost = f"${result.cost_estimated:.4f}" if result.cost_estimated else "-"
274	
275	    # Mise Ã  jour du tableau (remplace la ligne si elle existe)
276	    for row in table.rows:
277	        if row.cells and row.cells[0].plain == agent_id:
278	            row.cells[1].plain = f"{icon} {result.status.value if hasattr(result.status, 'value') else result.status}"
279	            row.cells[2].plain = dur
280	            row.cells[3].plain = tok
281	            row.cells[4].plain = cost
282	            return
283	
284	    table.add_row(agent_id, f"{icon} {result.status.value}", dur, tok, cost)
285	
286	
287	@cli.command()
288	@click.option("--session-id", "-s", required=True, help="ID de la session Ã  reprendre")
289	@click.option("--from", "from_agent", default=None, help="Reprendre depuis un agent spÃ©cifique")
290	def resume(session_id: str, from_agent: Optional[str] = None) -> None:
291	    """Reprend une session interrompue."""
292	    session_manager = SessionManager(config.SESSION_DIRECTORY)
293	
294	    try:
295	        session = session_manager.load(session_id)
296	    except Exception as e:
297	        click.echo(f"Session {session_id} introuvable : {e}", err=True)
298	        sys.exit(1)
299	
300	    session_manager.create_backup(session_id)
301	
302	    click.echo(f"Reprise de la session {session_id}")
303	    click.echo(f"Ã‰tat : {session.status} | Dernier agent : {session.last_completed_agent_id or 'aucun'}")
304	
305	    if from_agent:
306	        # RÃ©initialiser Ã  partir de l'agent spÃ©cifiÃ©
307	        click.echo(f"Reprise forcÃ©e depuis {from_agent}")
308	        session.current_agent_id = from_agent
309	        session.status = "running"
310	        # Marquer les agents prÃ©cÃ©dents comme completed s'ils ne le sont pas
311	        from_index = _agent_index(from_agent)
312	        for agent_id, result in session.agent_results.items():
313	            if _agent_index(agent_id) >= from_index:
314	                if result.status == AgentStatus.COMPLETED:
315	                    result.status = AgentStatus.PENDING  # Re-exÃ©cuter
316	
317	    configure_logging(session_id)
318	    asyncio.run(_run_pipeline(session, session_manager))
319	
320	
321	def _agent_index(agent_id: str) -> int:
322	    from hermes.core.workflow import AGENT_ORDER
323	    try:
324	        return AGENT_ORDER.index(agent_id)
325	    except ValueError:
326	        return 999
327	
328	
329	@cli.command()
330	@click.option("--session-id", "-s", required=True, help="ID de la session Ã  rejouer")
331	def replay(session_id: str) -> None:
332	    """Rejoue une session en mode dry-run (debug sans API)."""
333	    session_manager = SessionManager(config.SESSION_DIRECTORY)
334	    try:
335	        session = session_manager.load(session_id)
336	    except Exception as e:
337	        click.echo(f"Session {session_id} introuvable : {e}", err=True)
338	        sys.exit(1)
339	
340	    session.config.dry_run = True
341	    session.config.replay_session_id = session_id
342	    click.echo(f"Replay de la session {session_id} en mode dry-run")
343	    configure_logging(f"replay_{session_id}")
344	    asyncio.run(_run_pipeline(session, session_manager))
345	
346	
347	@cli.command()
348	@click.option("--session-id", "-s", default=None, help="Afficher une session spÃ©cifique")
349	@click.option("--list", "list_all", is_flag=True, help="Lister toutes les sessions")
350	def status(session_id: Optional[str] = None, list_all: bool = False) -> None:
351	    """Affiche l'Ã©tat des sessions."""
352	    session_manager = SessionManager(config.SESSION_DIRECTORY)
353	
354	    if list_all or not session_id:
355	        sessions = session_manager.list_sessions()
356	        if not sessions:
357	            click.echo("Aucune session trouvÃ©e.")
358	            return
359	        for s in sessions:
360	            status_icon = {"completed": "âœ“", "failed": "âœ—", "running": "â€¦", "created": "â—‹"}.get(
361	                s.get("status", ""), "?"
362	            )
363	            click.echo(
364	                f"[{status_icon}] {s['session_id']} | {s.get('keyword', 'N/A')} | "
365	                f"{s.get('status', '?')} | {s.get('agent_count', 0)} agents | "
366	                f"{s.get('updated_at', '?')[:19]}"
367	            )
368	    else:
369	        session = session_manager.load(session_id)
370	        click.echo(f"Session: {session.session_id}")
371	        click.echo(f"Mot-clÃ©: {session.keyword}")
372	        click.echo(f"Statut: {session.status.value}")
373	        click.echo(f"Mode: {session.config.mode.value}")
374	        click.echo(f"CrÃ©Ã©e: {session.created_at}")
375	        click.echo(f"Mise Ã  jour: {session.updated_at}")
376	        click.echo(f"Erreurs: {session.error_count}")
377	        click.echo(f"Avertissements: {len(session.warnings)}")
378	        click.echo("\nAgents:")
379	        for agent_id, result in session.agent_results.items():
380	            icon = {"completed": "âœ“", "failed": "âœ—", "skipped_auto": "â­", "skipped_user": "â­",
381	                    "pending": "â—‹", "running": "â€¦"}.get(result.status.value, "?")
382	            click.echo(
383	                f"  [{icon}] {agent_id} â€” {result.status.value}"
384	                f"{' â€” ' + result.error_message if result.error_message else ''}"
385	            )
386	
387	
388	@cli.command()
389	def check() -> None:
390	    """ExÃ©cute le startup check uniquement."""
391	    check_and_exit()
392	
393	
394	if __name__ == "__main__":
395	    cli()

"""Point d'entrÃ©e CLI Hermes SEO."""

import asyncio
import sys
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional

import click

from hermes import config
from hermes.core.exceptions import (
    HermesError,
    SkipBlockedError,
    StartupCheckError,
)
from hermes.core.logging import configure_logging
from hermes.core.session_manager import SessionManager
from hermes.models.common import AgentStatus, QualityMode, generate_session_id
from hermes.models.session import AgentResult, SessionConfig, SessionState
from hermes.startup_check import check_and_exit


@click.group()
@click.version_option(version="0.1.0", prog_name="Hermes SEO")
def cli() -> None:
    """Hermes SEO v3 â€” Usine Ã©ditoriale multi-agents SEO/AEO/GEO."""
    pass


@cli.command()
@click.option("--keyword", "-k", required=True, help="Mot-clÃ© cible")
@click.option("--site-url", "-s", default="", help="URL du site cible")
@click.option("--objectif", "-o", default="", help="Objectif Ã©ditorial")
@click.option("--mode", "-m", default="standard",
              type=click.Choice(["fast", "standard", "premium", "compliance", "debug"]),
              help="Mode qualitÃ©")
@click.option("--secteur", default="autre", help="Secteur d'activitÃ©")
@click.option("--dry-run", is_flag=True, help="Mode simulation sans appel API")
@click.option("--skip", "-x", multiple=True, help="Agents Ã  ignorer (rÃ©pÃ©table)")
@click.option("--token-budget", type=int, default=config.DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET,
              help="Budget max en tokens")
@click.option("--cost-budget", type=float, default=config.DEFAULT_COST_BUDGET,
              help="Budget max en USD")
@click.option("--yes", is_flag=True, help="Confirmer automatiquement les skips")
def run(
    keyword: str,
    site_url: str,
    objectif: str,
    mode: str,
    secteur: str,
    dry_run: bool,
    skip: tuple[str, ...],
    token_budget: int,
    cost_budget: float,
    yes: bool,
) -> None:
    """Lance un pipeline complet pour un mot-clÃ©."""
    # Startup check
    require_serp = not dry_run and mode != "fast"
    check_and_exit(require_llm=not dry_run, require_serp=require_serp)

    # Construire la session
    session = SessionState(
        config=SessionConfig(
            mode=QualityMode(mode),
            dry_run=dry_run,
            token_budget=token_budget,
            cost_budget=cost_budget,
            target_url=site_url or None,
            secteur=secteur,
            user_skipped_agents=list(skip),
            skip_confirmed=yes,
        ),
        keyword=keyword,
        site_url=site_url or None,
        objectif=objectif or None,
    )

    # Configurer les logs
    configure_logging(session.session_id)

    # ExÃ©cuter le pipeline
    session_manager = SessionManager(config.SESSION_DIRECTORY)
    asyncio.run(_run_pipeline(session, session_manager))


async def _run_pipeline(session: SessionState, session_manager: SessionManager) -> None:
    """ExÃ©cute le pipeline complet."""
    from hermes.core.workflow import get_active_agents
    from hermes.core.transitions import should_skip_agent, get_skip_warning
    from hermes.core.logging import (
        log_agent_start, log_agent_completed, log_agent_failed, log_agent_skipped,
    )
    from hermes.core.budget import BudgetTracker
    from hermes.agents import AGENT_REGISTRY
    from hermes.core.exceptions import SkipBlockedError
    from rich.console import Console
    from rich.table import Table
    from rich.live import Live
    from rich.panel import Panel

    console = Console()

    # Afficher l'en-tÃªte
    console.print(Panel.fit(
        f"[bold]Hermes SEO v3[/bold]\n"
        f"Mot-clÃ© : [cyan]{session.keyword}[/cyan]\n"
        f"Mode : [yellow]{session.config.mode.value}[/yellow] | "
        f"Budget : {session.config.token_budget:,} tokens / ${session.config.cost_budget:.2f}\n"
        f"Dry-run : {'[red]ON[/red]' if session.config.dry_run else '[green]OFF[/green]'} | "
        f"Session : [dim]{session.session_id}[/dim]",
        title="Session dÃ©marrÃ©e",
    ))

    # Calculer les agents actifs
    has_existing = False
    if "agent_08" not in session.config.user_skipped_agents:
        try:
            from hermes.core.memory import MemoryStore
            mem = MemoryStore(config.CHROMA_PERSIST_DIRECTORY)
            has_existing = mem.has_existing_content()
        except Exception:
            pass

    active_agents = get_active_agents(
        mode=session.config.mode,
        secteur=session.config.secteur,
        user_skipped=list(session.config.user_skipped_agents),
        has_existing_content=has_existing,
        has_locale_target=bool(session.config.target_locales),
    )

    # VÃ©rifier les skips non autorisÃ©s
    non_skippable = {"agent_00", "agent_01", "agent_04", "agent_07", "agent_15", "agent_25"}
    if session.config.mode != QualityMode.DEBUG:
        illegal = set(session.config.user_skipped_agents) & non_skippable
        if illegal:
            raise SkipBlockedError(list(illegal)[0])

    budget = BudgetTracker(
        token_budget=session.config.token_budget,
        cost_budget=session.config.cost_budget,
    )

    # Tableau de progression
    table = Table(title="Progression du pipeline")
    table.add_column("Agent", style="cyan")
    table.add_column("Statut", style="yellow")
    table.add_column("DurÃ©e", style="dim")
    table.add_column("Tokens", style="green")
    table.add_column("CoÃ»t", style="magenta")

    # Initialiser tous les rÃ©sultats
    for agent_id in active_agents:
        session.agent_results[agent_id] = AgentResult(
            agent_id=agent_id,
            agent_name=agent_id.replace("_", " ").title(),
            status=AgentStatus.PENDING,
        )

    with Live(table, console=console, refresh_per_second=4) as live:
        for agent_id in active_agents:
            # Mettre Ã  jour l'affichage
            session.current_agent_id = agent_id
            result = session.agent_results[agent_id]

            # VÃ©rifier le skip
            skip_decision, skip_reason, skip_type = should_skip_agent(
                agent_id, session, set(active_agents), has_existing,
                bool(session.config.target_locales),
            )

            if skip_decision:
                if skip_type == "user" and not session.config.skip_confirmed:
                    # Avertissement pour skip manuel
                    console.print(
                        f"[yellow]âš  {get_skip_warning(agent_id)}[/yellow]\n"
                        f"[yellow]Confirmer le skip de {agent_id} ? (utilisez --yes pour confirmer)[/yellow]"
                    )
                    if not click.confirm("Continuer ?"):
                        console.print("[red]Pipeline annulÃ©.[/red]")
                        return

                result.status = AgentStatus.SKIPPED_USER if skip_type == "user" else AgentStatus.SKIPPED_AUTO
                result.skip_reason = skip_reason
                result.skip_impact = get_skip_warning(agent_id)
                log_agent_skipped(agent_id, result.agent_name, result.status.value, skip_reason)
                _update_table_row(table, result, agent_id)

                # Sauvegarder aprÃ¨s chaque agent
                session_manager.save(session)
                continue

            # ExÃ©cuter l'agent
            result.status = AgentStatus.RUNNING
            _update_table_row(table, result, agent_id)
            log_agent_start(agent_id, result.agent_name)
            start_time = datetime.now()

            try:
                # Appeler l'agent
                agent_fn = AGENT_REGISTRY[agent_id]
                session = await agent_fn(session)
                elapsed = (datetime.now() - start_time)
                result.duration_ms = int(elapsed.total_seconds() * 1000)
                result.status = AgentStatus.COMPLETED
                result.prompt_version = "v1"
                result.model_used = "stub" if session.config.dry_run else "auto"

                log_agent_completed(
                    agent_id, result.agent_name, result.duration_ms,
                    tokens_input=result.tokens_input or 0,
                    tokens_output=result.tokens_output or 0,
                    cost_estimated=result.cost_estimated or 0.0,
                    prompt_version=result.prompt_version,
                    model_used=result.model_used,
                )

            except Exception as e:
                elapsed = (datetime.now() - start_time)
                result.duration_ms = int(elapsed.total_seconds() * 1000)
                result.status = AgentStatus.FAILED
                result.error_message = str(e)
                result.error_traceback = str(e)
                session.error_count += 1
                session.status = "failed"

                log_agent_failed(agent_id, result.agent_name, str(e), result.duration_ms)
                _update_table_row(table, result, agent_id)

                # Sauvegarder l'Ã©tat avant de quitter
                session_manager.save(session)
                console.print(
                    f"\n[red]Pipeline Ã©chouÃ© Ã  {agent_id} : {e}[/red]\n"
                    f"[dim]Session sauvegardÃ©e : {session.session_id}[/dim]\n"
                    f"[dim]Relancez avec : hermes resume --session-id {session.session_id}[/dim]"
                )
                return

            # Mettre Ã  jour l'affichage
            _update_table_row(table, result, agent_id)

            # Sauvegarder aprÃ¨s chaque agent
            session_manager.save(session)

    # Pipeline terminÃ©
    session.status = "completed"
    session_manager.save(session)

    elapsed_total = (datetime.now() - session.created_at).total_seconds()
    console.print(
        f"\n[bold green]Pipeline terminÃ© avec succÃ¨s ![/bold green]\n"
        f"Session : [dim]{session.session_id}[/dim]\n"
        f"DurÃ©e totale : {elapsed_total:.1f}s\n"
        f"Budget : {budget.summary()}"
    )


def _update_table_row(table, result, agent_id):
    """Met Ã  jour une ligne dans le tableau de progression."""
    status_icons = {
        "completed": "[green]âœ“[/green]",
        "skipped_auto": "[yellow]â­[/yellow]",
        "skipped_user": "[yellow]â­[/yellow]",
        "failed": "[red]âœ—[/red]",
        "running": "[blue]â€¦[/blue]",
        "pending": "[dim]â—‹[/dim]",
    }
    icon = status_icons.get(result.status.value if hasattr(result.status, 'value') else str(result.status), "?")
    dur = f"{result.duration_ms}ms" if result.duration_ms else "-"
    tok = f"{result.tokens_input or 0}+{result.tokens_output or 0}" if result.tokens_input else "-"
    cost = f"${result.cost_estimated:.4f}" if result.cost_estimated else "-"

    # Mise Ã  jour du tableau (remplace la ligne si elle existe)
    for row in table.rows:
        if row.cells and row.cells[0].plain == agent_id:
            row.cells[1].plain = f"{icon} {result.status.value if hasattr(result.status, 'value') else result.status}"
            row.cells[2].plain = dur
            row.cells[3].plain = tok
            row.cells[4].plain = cost
            return

    table.add_row(agent_id, f"{icon} {result.status.value}", dur, tok, cost)


@cli.command()
@click.option("--session-id", "-s", required=True, help="ID de la session Ã  reprendre")
@click.option("--from", "from_agent", default=None, help="Reprendre depuis un agent spÃ©cifique")
def resume(session_id: str, from_agent: Optional[str] = None) -> None:
    """Reprend une session interrompue."""
    session_manager = SessionManager(config.SESSION_DIRECTORY)

    try:
        session = session_manager.load(session_id)
    except Exception as e:
        click.echo(f"Session {session_id} introuvable : {e}", err=True)
        sys.exit(1)

    session_manager.create_backup(session_id)

    click.echo(f"Reprise de la session {session_id}")
    click.echo(f"Ã‰tat : {session.status} | Dernier agent : {session.last_completed_agent_id or 'aucun'}")

    if from_agent:
        # RÃ©initialiser Ã  partir de l'agent spÃ©cifiÃ©
        click.echo(f"Reprise forcÃ©e depuis {from_agent}")
        session.current_agent_id = from_agent
        session.status = "running"
        # Marquer les agents prÃ©cÃ©dents comme completed s'ils ne le sont pas
        from_index = _agent_index(from_agent)
        for agent_id, result in session.agent_results.items():
            if _agent_index(agent_id) >= from_index:
                if result.status == AgentStatus.COMPLETED:
                    result.status = AgentStatus.PENDING  # Re-exÃ©cuter

    configure_logging(session_id)
    asyncio.run(_run_pipeline(session, session_manager))


def _agent_index(agent_id: str) -> int:
    from hermes.core.workflow import AGENT_ORDER
    try:
        return AGENT_ORDER.index(agent_id)
    except ValueError:
        return 999


@cli.command()
@click.option("--session-id", "-s", required=True, help="ID de la session Ã  rejouer")
def replay(session_id: str) -> None:
    """Rejoue une session en mode dry-run (debug sans API)."""
    session_manager = SessionManager(config.SESSION_DIRECTORY)
    try:
        session = session_manager.load(session_id)
    except Exception as e:
        click.echo(f"Session {session_id} introuvable : {e}", err=True)
        sys.exit(1)

    session.config.dry_run = True
    session.config.replay_session_id = session_id
    click.echo(f"Replay de la session {session_id} en mode dry-run")
    configure_logging(f"replay_{session_id}")
    asyncio.run(_run_pipeline(session, session_manager))


@cli.command()

            )

            click.echo(

content.text:
Voici le rapport complet en francais.

---

## Rapport d'exploration -- Hermes SEO

### 1. Interface Streamlit (app.py)

**Fichier :** `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\app.py`

L'application est une **page unique** (pas de multi-pages Streamlit). Il n'y a pas de dossier `pages/`, pas de navigation, pas d'onglets. L'UI se compose de :

**Barre laterale (sidebar) :**
- Selecteur de mode qualite : `fast`, `standard` (defaut), `premium`, `compliance`
- Selecteur de secteur : 12 secteurs (generaliste, finance, sante, droit, ecommerce, saas, formation, immobilier, tourisme, rh, cybersecurite, enfants)
- Champ URL du site (optionnel)
- Champ objectif (optionnel)
- Checkbox "Mode essai" (dry-run) -- cochee par defaut
- Affichage de l'ID de session si une session est en cours

**Page principale :**
- Champ mot-cle
- Bouton "Generer le contenu"
- Bouton "Rejouer" (si session existante)
- Bouton "Telecharger" (si contenu genere)
- **Resultats** (affiches apres generation) :
  - Score qualite /100 avec code couleur (vert/orange/rouge)
  - Decision "Publiable / A corriger"
  - Score EEAT /16
  - Score Fiabilite /10
  - Detail des 9 criteres avec barres de progression
  - Recommandations et blocages
  - Liste des agents executes (27 agents max)
  - Apercu du contenu genere (HTML nettoye)
  - Metadonnees SEO (title, meta description)
  - Schema.org JSON-LD (dans un expander)
  - Info d'export

**Quand aucune session :** page d'accueil avec explications "Comment ca marche"

---

### 2. Pages/onglets et historique

**Il n'y a AUCUNE page d'historique ou d'archive dans l'UI actuelle.**

- Pas de dossier `pages/`
- Pas de `st.navigation` ou `st.page`
- Le mot "historique", "archive", "history" n'apparait nulle part dans `app.py`
- `st.tabs` n'est pas utilise

En revanche, le `SessionManager` (dans `hermes/core/session_manager.py`) a deja une methode **`list_sessions()`** qui liste toutes les sessions sauvegardees sur disque (fichiers JSON dans `./sessions/`). Cette methode renvoie pour chaque session : `session_id`, `keyword`, `status`, `updated_at`, `agent_count`. Mais elle **n'est jamais appelee depuis l'UI** -- elle existe cote backend, prete a etre utilisee.

---

### 3. Gestion des settings

**Fichier :** `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\config.py`

La configuration suit un ordre de priorite a 3 niveaux :
1. **Streamlit Secrets** (`st.secrets`) -- prioritaire, utilise en production sur Streamlit Cloud
2. **Fichier `.env`** -- charge via `python-dotenv`, utilise en local
3. **Valeurs par defaut** -- si aucune des sources ci-dessus ne fournit la valeur

Variables exposees par `config.py` :
- Cles API : `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`
- Cles SERP : `TALORDATA_API_KEY`, `SCRAPEDO_API_KEY`, `SERPSTACK_API_KEY`
- Google : `GSC_CLIENT_ID`, `GSC_CLIENT_SECRET`
- Chemins : `CHROMA_PERSIST_DIRECTORY` (defaut `./data/chroma`), `SQLITE_DB_PATH` (defaut `./data/sqlite/hermes.db`)
- Budgets : `DEFAULT_TOKEN_BUDGET` (1M), `DEFAULT_COST_BUDGET` (5.0$)
- Mode qualite par defaut : `standard`
- Ollama (fallback local) : `OLLAMA_BASE_URL`, `OLLAMA_MODEL`

**Fichier `.streamlit/secrets.toml` :** Template de configuration Streamlit Cloud avec les memes variables.

---

### 4. Deployment

**Fichier :** `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\DEPLOIEMENT.md`

Deploiement prevu exclusivement sur **Streamlit Cloud** :
1. Pousser le code sur GitHub
2. Connecter Streamlit Cloud au repo GitHub
3. Fichier principal : `app.py`
4. Copier `.streamlit/secrets.toml` dans les Settings de l'app
5. Deploiement automatique a chaque `git push`

Pas de Dockerfile, pas de configuration pour un autre hebergeur (Railway, Hugging Face Spaces, etc.). Pas de `setup.sh` ou `packages.txt`.

---

### 5. Dependances

**requirements.txt** et **pyproject.toml** sont coherents. Les principales dependances :

| Categorie | Paquets |
|-----------|---------|
| UI | `streamlit>=1.32` |
| LLM | `anthropic>=0.40`, `openai>=1.60` |
| Orchestration | `langgraph>=0.3`, `langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite>=2.0` |
| Memoire vectorielle | `chromadb>=0.5` |
| Validation | `pydantic>=2.0` |
| Logging | `loguru>=0.7` |
| Utilitaires | `tenacity`, `tiktoken`, `rich`, `pyyaml`, `httpx`, `python-dotenv` |
| CMS (optionnel) | `python-wordpress-xmlrpc` |

Dev : `pytest`, `ruff`, `mypy`.

---

### 6. Budget tracking

**Fichier :** `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\core\budget.py`

Classe `BudgetTracker` avec les metriques suivantes :
- `token_budget` et `cost_budget` (seuils configures)
- `tokens_used` et `cost_used` (consommation reelle)
- Estimation du cout par modele (modele -> (cout_input, cout_output) par million de tokens)
- 8 modeles definis : Claude Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5, Opus 4.7, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4 mini/nano, DeepSeek v4 flash/pro
- Alerte a 80% du budget
- Arret BLOQUANT si depassement (pas de skip silencieux)
- `summary()` : affiche le ratio utilise/budget

Metriques trackees au niveau session uniquement (pas d'agregation historique entre sessions).

---

### 7. ChromaDB (Memory)

**Fichier :** `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\core\memory.py`

Trois collections ChromaDB :
1. **`published_content`** -- contenus publies, utilises pour l'anti-cannibalisation (Agent 08)
2. **`entities`** -- entites nommees extraites des documents
3. **`editorial_decisions`** -- historique des decisions editoriales

Methodes disponibles :
- `add_content()` / `search_similar()` -- pour la memoire des contenus
- `add_entities()` / `get_similar_entities()` -- pour les entites
- `record_decision()` -- pour les decisions editoriales
- `count_published()` / `has_existing_content()` -- utilitaires

---

### 8. Session Manager

**Fichier :** `C:\Users\Utilisateur\Desktop\multi-agent-seo\hermes\core\session_manager.py`

Persistance des sessions en JSON sur disque (dossier `./sessions/`).
- `save()` / `load()` -- serialisation via Pydantic
- `list_sessions()` -- deja implementee mais **pas connectee a l'UI**
- `delete()` / `has_session()` / `create_backup()`
- `get_last_completed_agent()` -- reprise de session

---

### Resume des points cles

| Question | Reponse |
|----------|---------|
| Combien de pages/onglets ? | **1 seule page**, pas d'onglets, pas de multi-pages |
| Page historique/archive ? | **Non** -- la methode `list_sessions()` existe dans `SessionManager` mais n'est pas utilisee dans l'UI |
| Gestion des settings | Priorite : Streamlit Secrets > .env > defaults, via `_get()` dans `config.py` |
| Deployment | **Streamlit Cloud uniquement**, deploiement automatique sur git push |
| Metriques trackees | Tokens, cout, scores qualite (9 criteres), EEAT /16, Fiabilite /10 -- **au niveau session uniquement**, pas d'agregateur multi-session |
